meta.title: Flowise Workflow Builder
meta.description: Execute visual workflows built in Flowise via API

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: Trigger Flowise workflow via webhook. Expected JSON: { flowId, inputs?, extraData?, sessionId?, chatId? }. API key via X-API-Key header only (no body fallback). Set FLOWISE_API_KEY env var to enable auth.

nodes.name: Validate Input
nodes.notes: SECURITY: Input validation with timing-safe API key auth (header only, no body fallback, early length check prevents null-byte attacks). Validates flowId format (no path traversal), inputs/extraData structure, and optional session/chat IDs.

nodes.name: Check Valid
nodes.notes: Branch based on validation result. True branch continues to Flowise Request, false branch goes to Error Response.

nodes.name: Error Response
nodes.notes: Return HTTP 400 for validation errors. Configured as response node for webhook responseMode.

nodes.name: Flowise Request
nodes.notes: Forward validated inputs to Flowise API. 5 min timeout, 100MB max response.

nodes.name: Success Response
nodes.notes: Return Flowise response. Configured as response node for webhook responseMode.
